mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid unemployment increases signal deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings expectations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in >65% of triggered instances, or the signal yields a negative Rank IC over consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate collapsing aggregate demand, forcing equity prices lower over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods yield positive 60d returns in >55% of historical cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production above its 2017 baseline indicates robust manufacturing capacity utilization, generating short-term positive momentum in equity markets during expansion regimes.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of observations when INDPRO exceeds 100, or the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of high-inflation trigger months, or the inflation threshold shows no predictive power in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirm labor market tightening, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60d returns in >55% of historical instances, or the interaction effect vanishes after controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly correlates with improved corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 across all 3-year rolling windows in the sample, or GDP growth shows zero correlation with forward equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial production signal immediate supply-side shocks and inventory drawdowns, triggering rapid negative equity repricing during stress regimes.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of sharp industrial production decline events, or the trigger fails to predict downside risk in out-of-sample periods.
